P

paintComponent(Graphics) - Method in class view.GamePanel
Main method to repaint the screen at every update of the thread
pauseState - Variable in class view.UI
 
pauseState(int) - Method in class controller.KeyHandler
Method to handle the specific case of a key pressed while the game is paused
pickUpObject(int) - Method in class model.PlayerModel
Method to pick up a power-up when the player touches it
placeBomb() - Method in class controller.JBomberMan
Method to place a new bomb, if the maximum number of bombs is not yet met and if the cooldown time from the last bomb is elapsed
play() - Method in class controller.Sound
Plays the track selected with the setFile method
PlayerModel - Class in model
Class to model the model of the player.
PlayerView - Class in view
Class to manage the position of the player for the view package
PlayerView(int, int) - Constructor for class view.PlayerView
Class constructor
playMusic(int) - Method in class controller.JBomberMan
Method to start playing the selected music
playSE(int) - Method in class controller.JBomberMan
Plays the selected Sound Effect
playState - Variable in class view.UI
 
playState(int) - Method in class controller.KeyHandler
Method to handle the specific case of a key pressed while playing the game
PowerUp - Class in model
Class used just to keep track in the model of the powerups on the map.
PowerUp(String, int, int) - Constructor for class model.PowerUp
Class constructor
powerUpsView - Static variable in class view.PowerUpView
 
PowerUpView - Class in view
 
PowerUpView(String, int, int) - Constructor for class view.PowerUpView
 
profileState(int) - Method in class controller.KeyHandler
Method to handle the specific case of a key pressed while on the profile screen
